SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School Name, Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)  FROM frpm  WHERE School Type = 'Continuation'  ORDER BY Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17) ASC  LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Zip FROM schools WHERE County = 'Fresno County Office of Education' AND Charter = 'Y'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MailStreet FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE FundingType = 'Charter' AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.AvgScrMath > 400 AND s.Virtual = 'Y'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.District, s.County  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr > 500 AND (s.Magnet = 'Y' OR s.GSoffered = 'Y')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores st JOIN schools s ON st.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE st.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 > 0) AND st.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(satscores.NumTstTakr)  FROM satscores  JOIN frpm ON satscores.cds = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE frpm.FRPM_Count_K_12 = (SELECT MAX(FRPM_Count_K_12) FROM frpm)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores s JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode WHERE s.AvgScrMath > 560 AND sch.FundingType = 'Charter'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT FRPMCount_Ages_5_17 FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE Enrollment > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)")  FROM satscores  JOIN frpm ON satscores.cds = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE (NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr) > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY (ss.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / ss.NumTstTakr) DESC  LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.NCESSchool FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode ORDER BY f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT dname, AVG(AvgScrRead) AS AverageReadingScore  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Active'  GROUP BY dname  ORDER BY AverageReadingScore DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores WHERE cname = 'Alameda' AND NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sa.AvgScrWrite > 499 GROUP BY s.CharterNum ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores s JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Fresno' AND f.Charter School = 'N' AND s.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Amador' AND Low Grade = 9 AND High Grade = 12	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'  AND Free Meal Count (K-12) > 500  AND FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.sname, s.dname, s.cname, MAX(sa.NumTstTakr) AS MaxTestTakers FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa' GROUP BY s.sname, s.dname, s.cname ORDER BY MaxTestTakers DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.Street || ' ' || s.StreetAbr || ', ' || s.City || ', ' || s.Zip AS FullAddress FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE ABS(f.Enrollment_K12 - f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.District, s.County  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE f.Percent_Eligible_Free_K12 > 0.1 AND sa.NumTstTakr > 0 AND sa.AvgScrRead >= 1500	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.FundingType  FROM satscores sa  JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE s.County = 'Riverside' AND sa.AvgScrMath > 400	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Street, City, Zip, State  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Monterey'  AND High Grade = '12'  AND FRPM Count (Ages 5-17) > 800	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.sname, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore, s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') GROUP BY s.sname, s.Phone	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE (f.Enrollment_K12 - f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) >  (SELECT AVG(f2.Enrollment_K12 - f2.Enrollment_Ages_5_17)   FROM frpm f2   WHERE f2.Charter_Funding_Type = 'Locally Funded')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT OpenDate FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE LowGrade = 1 AND HighGrade = 12 ORDER BY Enrollment DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, SUM(Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM frpm WHERE HighGrade >= 1 AND LowGrade <= 12 GROUP BY City ORDER BY TotalEnrollment ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, FRPM Count (K-12)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Code = 66  ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC  LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.Website FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17) FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Kacey' AND AdmLName1 = 'Gibson'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmEmail1 FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE Charter School = 'Y' ORDER BY Enrollment DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Street, City, Zip, State FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite ASC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles' AND sa.NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31' AND schools.County = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified' ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.sname  FROM satscores s  JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode  WHERE sch.Virtual = 'Y'  ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC  LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Educational Option Type FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath), County  FROM satscores  WHERE cds = (SELECT cds                FROM satscores                ORDER BY (AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) / 3                LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 > 0) AND sa.NumGE1500 > 0 GROUP BY s.City	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS Average_Writing_Score FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.State, s.School, SUM(f.Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.StatusType = 'Special' GROUP BY s.State, s.School ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(OpenDate) AS MonthlyAverageOpenedSchools FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Orange' AND StatusType = 'Merged' AND SchoolType = 'Unified') * 1.0 /      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Orange' AND StatusType = 'Merged' AND SchoolType = 'Elementary') AS Ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
